description_short: Crateful is a wholesale marketplace where independent restaurants order from local farms and specialty producers in one cart with consolidated delivery.
description_long:
Crateful connects independent restaurants with local farms and specialty food producers. Chefs browse live inventory, order from multiple suppliers in one cart, and receive consolidated next-day delivery, with invoices in one dashboard that syncs to accounting software.

Producers use it to reach restaurant buyers without a sales team — Crateful handles payments, logistics, and returns. Founded by restaurant-industry veterans in 2022, it is live in Chicago, IL and expanding to two more cities this year.
